questions.question_text: The sides of a rectangular field are 55 m and 70 m long. Its area is equal to the area of a circular field. What is the perimeter (in m) of the circular field? (Take $\pi = \frac{22}{7}$)
4 years ago, the age of Shyam was seven times the age of his son. Rajat. After 8 years, Shyam's age will be three times the age of Rajat. Find the present age of Shyam.

A delivery order travels from Warehouse A to Store B, a distance of 48 km, at a speed of 32 km/hr. On the return journey along the same route, due to traffic, he travels at a speed of 24 km/hr. What is the driver's average speed for the entire trip? (Round off up to two decimal places.)

A train overtakes two runners moving in the same direction at speeds of 5 km/h and 7 km/h, passing them completely in 18 seconds and 20 seconds, respectively. What is the length of the train (in metres)?
Which of the following is a pair of co-primes?

A tank is filled by two pipes, A and B, and emptied by a third pipe C. Pipe A fills the tank in 10 hours, and pipe B in 15 hours. Pipe C empties it in 20 hours. If all three pipes are opened together, and pipe C is closed after 4 hours, how much total time will it take to fill the tank?
The marked price of an article is ₹500. During a sale, its price is reduced to ₹450. What is the percentage decrease in price?

From the top of a cliff 80 meters high, the angles of depression of two ships in the same direction are $30^\circ$ and $60^\circ$. Find the distance between the ships (rounded off to two decimal places).
A shopkeeper marks the price of sugar 24% above the cost price and gives a discount of 18%. But uses a weight of 800 grams instead of 1 kg. Find his overall profit percentage.
Find the value of $$\frac{(3)^{-5} \times (8)^3 \times (125)^3}{(100)^3 \times 256 \times (2)^3}$$
Find the mean proportional between $(2 + \sqrt{3})$ and $(10 - \sqrt{75})$.
Find the least value of $(4K^2 + 2M)$ for which the five digits number 7KM93 is divisible by 9.
Nita sells two articles for ₹2,973 each with no profit, no loss in the entire transaction. If one article was sold at a gain of 20%, then the other article is sold at a loss of:
Simplify: $$\sqrt[3]{\frac{4096}{10000}} \times \frac{5}{48} \times 186$$
X, Y, and Z enter into a partnership. X invests ₹60,000 for 12 months, Y invests ₹80,000 for 8 months and Z invests ₹1,20,000 for 4 months. If the total profit is ₹77,000, what is the share of Z?
A shirt originally costing ₹800 is first decreased by 30% and then increased by 15%. What is the new price?
Find the rate of interest at which the simple interest on ₹15,000 for 4 years is ₹3,600.
An article marked at ₹1,250 is sold at two successive discounts such that the selling price becomes ₹900. If the first discount is 20%, what is the second discount?

Two taps can fill a cistern in 4 hours and 22 hours, respectively. A third tap can empty it in 24 hours. How long (in hours) will it take to fill one-fourth of the empty cistern if all the taps are opened together?
A cylindrical tank has a diameter of 12 m and a height of 10 m. If the tank is closed at both ends, what is the ratio of its curved surface area to its total surface area?
Find the mean of the following data. Class Interval: 0-8, 8-16, 16-24, 24-32, 32-40, 40-48. Frequency: 4, 6, 7, 3, 12, 8.
The largest four-digit number which when divided by 10, 11 and 8 leaves remainder 7 in each case is:

The original price of a refrigerator was ₹1,500. During a clearance sale, it was initially discounted by 20%. There by an additional discount of 25% on the reduced price. What is the total percentage discount applied to the refrigerator?
The average of 12 numbers is 38. If two more numbers 50 and 62 are included, the new average is: (Round off your answer to two decimal places.)
The measure of an interior angle of a regular polygon is $162^\circ$. Find the number of sides of the polygon.
The mean proportional between 12 and a number is twice the mean proportional between 9 and 16. Find the number.

A shopkeeper sells two types of pens, A and B. The total number of pens sold in a day is 180. The price of pen A is ₹6 each and pen B is ₹8 each. If the total sale amount is ₹1120, how many pens of type A did he sell?

Two banks, A and B, offered loans at 3.5% and 8.5% per annum, respectively. Ajay deposits ₹28,000 with each bank. What is the difference between the amounts of simple interest (in ₹) paid to the two banks by Ajay after 2 years.
As of Union Budget 2025-26, what is the proposed size of the new Fund of Funds for startups?

options.text: Neither I nor II is correct
Both I and II are correct

questions.question_text: Consider the following statements about Right to Information (RTI) and choose the correct option: I. RTI has become a weapon to ensure maximum fairness and transparency. II. RTI has also been used to enhance the efficiency of the working of the Consumer Forums.
Which new industries grew after 1991 due to economic reforms?
Which of the following keyboard shortcuts is used to paste copied content?
The largest freshwater lake in India is:
By what percentage did rural road connectivity improve under the Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY) between 2000 and 2020, according to the Ministry of Rural Development?
In 2025, which Caribbean Island nation conferred the Honorary Order of Freedom on Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi?
Who among the following personalities received the Bharat Ratna in 2008 and is widely famous with his performance in 'Mile Sur Mera Tumhara'?
Swami Vivekananda represented India at which international event in 1893?
Karagattam, a popular folk dance of Tamil Nadu performed mainly by women balancing decorated pots, is dedicated to which deity?
Which of the following islands of India is closest to the Malabar Coast?
The Gram Nyayalayas Act was enacted in which of the following years?
Which of the following countries became a member of the BRICS' New Development Bank in May 2025?
Which Indian ruler was the first to enter into a Subsidiary Alliance with the British in 1798?

options.text: It requires Internet access to run.
It only works on removable media.
It is always visible to the user.
It primarily maintains and optimizes storage resources, not domain tasks like writing letters.

questions.question_text: A disk defragmenter rearranges file fragments on a hard drive for faster access. Why is this tool classified as system software rather than application software?
Which of the following machines was designed by Charles Babbage?
"The argumentative Indian," a book discussing Indian history and culture, is authored by:
The 42nd Amendment placed tribunals under which Part of the Constitution?

options.text: Bhimbetka Rock Shelters in Madhya Pradesh

questions.question_text: Which of the following sites has yielded Acheulian, Middle and Upper Palaeolithic and Mesolithic levels?
The basic unit of memory used by a computer to store binary data is called a:
What is a unitary feature of the Constitution of India?
Population density is defined as the number of people per:
What is the approximate speed of sound in air at room temperature (approximately $20^\circ C$ )?
In which of the following media does sound move the fastest at a particular temperature?

options.text: A. Integration of a country's economy with the world economy
B. Expansion of state ownership across major industries
C. Reduction in the volume of international trade
D. Economic isolation of countries from global markets

questions.question_text: What is the meaning of globalisation?
A solution is prepared by dissolving 15 g of salt in 585 g of water. Calculate the mass percent (w/w) of the solution.

options.text: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports

questions.question_text: Which union ministry primarily organized the national-level celebration for the $150^{th}$ anniversary of 'Vande Mataram'?
In March 2026, Jose Antonio Kast took oath as the President of which of the following countries?
Which term in the Preamble indicates that India has an elected head of state, NOT hereditary?

options.text: High birth rates and high death rates
Low birth rates and low life expectancy
High birth rates and low death rates
Low birth rates and high life expectancy

questions.question_text: In a population pyramid, a narrow base and a wider top are most likely to indicate which of the following?
Starch, a major component of flour and potatoes, is a polysaccharide. What chemical process occurs when starch is heated with water?

options.text: Aligarh Movement opposed science, while Arya Samaj rejected old scriptures.
Aligarh Movement supported Western-style education, while Arya Samaj promoted Vedic studies.
Aligarh Movement encouraged priestly control, while Arya Samaj rejected monotheism.
Aligarh Movement rejected modern learning, while Arya Samaj discouraged rational thinking.

questions.question_text: How did Sayyid Ahmad Khan's Aligarh Movement differ from the Arya Samaj?
The zone on Earth where no S-waves are detected is known as:
The Fundamental Duties suggested by the Swaran Singh Committee were incorporated through which Constitutional Amendment?
Through which two Indian states will the newly approved Greenfield High-Speed Corridor, sanctioned in April 2025, pass?
Where did the Prime Minister of India chair the $7^{th}$ National Board for Wildlife meeting in March 2025?
Who commissioned the Konark Sun Temple?
The First War of Independence (1857) began at which place?
Which of the following is the most important port-based industrial region in India?
What is the first phase of Kerala's Motor Vehicle Department (MVD) child safety rule implementation conducted in October 2024?

Based on the alphabetical order, three of the following four are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group? (Note: The odd man out is not based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter cluster.)

Refer to the following letter series and answer the question. (Counting to be done from left to right only). (L-M) V A R V Y R A C M W S A I G Z O W V R R F (Right) How many such vowels are there, each of which is immediately preceded by a consonant and also immediately followed by a consonant?

In a certain code language, 'A means 'A is the mother of B', A * B means 'A is the wife of B', A % B means 'A is the daughter of B' and A + B means 'A is the father of B'. Based on the above, how is 'S * D + R @ Y + H'? If R is related to T, if 'T * V + U ^ V - W ! Z'? How is S related to H if 'S * D + R @ Y + H'? And T * V + U ^ V - W ! Z ? Then how is S related to Z?
Select the pair which follows the same pattern as that followed by the two sets of pairs given below. Both pairs follow the same pattern. KXA : LBY KBN : LBJ

Seven boxes L, M, N, O, P, Q and R, are kept one over the other, but not necessarily in the same order. P is kept second from the top. Only three boxes are kept between L and M. N is kept immediately below P. R is kept above M. Q is kept immediately above O. How many boxes are kept between Q and M?
What should come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series based on the English alphabetical order? DXN HCR LHV FMZ ?

Each vowel in the word BACKLOG is changed to the letter immediately following it in the English alphabetical order and each consonant is changed to the letter immediately preceding it in the English alphabetical order. Which of the following letters will appear exactly twice in the new group of letters thus formed?

Seven people A, B, C, D, O, T and Z are sitting in a row, facing north. Only two people sit to the left of D. Only three people sit between O and Z. Only one person sits between Z and D. A sits to the immediate left of J. B is not an immediate neighbor of Z. Who sits immediately to the right of O?
What should come in place of '?' in the given series? 184 164 145 127 110 94 ?
What should come in place of ? in the given series based on the English alphabetical order? TWY UYA XAC ZCE ?

Seven boxes B, C, D, E, Q, R and S are kept one over the other but not necessarily in the same order. Only five boxes are kept above D. Only three boxes are kept between D and C. Only one box is kept between Q and D. How many boxes are kept between S and D?

Seven boxes B, C, D, E, Q, R and S are kept one over the other but not necessarily in the same order. Only five boxes are kept above D. Only three boxes are kept between D and C. Only four boxes are kept between C and S. Only E is kept between C and B. R is kept in one of the positions above C. How many boxes are kept between Q and S?
If 'A' stands for '+', 'B' stands for 'x', 'C' stands for '+' and 'D' stands for '-', then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation? 22 B 10 D 9 A 21 B 42 = ?

Based on the English alphabetical order, three of the following four letter-cluster pairs are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group? (Note: The odd one out is not based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter-cluster pairs.)

Read the given statement(s) and conclusions carefully. Assuming that the information given in the statements is true, even if it appears to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the statement(s). Statements: All diesels are petrol. Some petrol are fuels. Conclusions: (I) No fuel is diesel. (II) No petrol is diesel.

Select the set in which the numbers are related in the same way as are the numbers of the following sets. (NOTE: Operations should be performed on the whole numbers, without breaking down the numbers into their constituent digits. E.g., 13 - Operations on 13 such as adding/subtracting/multiplying etc. can be performed. Breaking down 13 into 1 and 3 and then performing mathematical operations on 1 and 3 is not allowed.) 13, 169 17, 324

Each of the digits in the number 2538841 is arranged in ascending order from left to right. What will be the sum of the digits that are second from the left and second from the right in the new number thus formed?

Based on the English alphabetical order, three of the following four are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group?. (Note: The odd one out is not based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter cluster.)

Sikar starts from Point A and drives 17 km towards the north. He then takes a left turn, drives 14 km, turns left and drives 18 km. He then takes a left turn and drives 19 km. He takes a final left turn, drives 1 km and stops at Point P. How far (shortest distance) and in which direction should he drive from Point A in order to reach Point P?

R, E, A, D, I, N and G are sitting around a circular table, facing the centre of the table. Only two people sit between R and A when counted from the right of R. Only three people sit between D and N when counted from the right of N. G sits to the immediate left of R. A sits to the immediate right of I. Who sits to the fourth of E?
If 'A' stands for '+', 'B' stands for 'x', 'C' stands for '+' and 'D' stands for '-', what will come in place of the question mark '?' in the following equation? 9 A 3 C 15 B 2 = ? D 10

Refer to the following number series and answer the question. (All numbers are single-digit numbers only. Counting to be done from left to right only.) (Left) 5 3 8 6 6 3 5 7 9 7 3 4 8 3 9 2 5 5 1 5 6 1 2 (Right) How many such even digits are there, each of which is immediately preceded by an even digit and also immediately followed by an even digit?
Select the triad that follows the same pattern as that followed by the two triads given below. Both triads follow the same pattern. JSL - BB AU-DL-IB
In a certain code language, 'hall menu peak' is coded as 'yy ae wp' and 'steak arch forum' is coded as 'mr yy sf'. How is 'peak' coded in that language?
What should come in place of '?' in the given series? 9 ? 18 45 109 234

In a certain code language, A+B means 'A is the mother of B', A*B means 'A is the wife of B', A%B means 'A is the daughter of B' and A-B means 'A is the father of B'. How is S related to H if 'S × D + R @ Y + H'?
Which of the following letter-number clusters will replace the question mark (?) in the given series to make it logically complete? RU29 QT37 PS45 OR53 ?
Select the triad that follows the same pattern as the one followed by the two triads given below. Both triads follow the same pattern. PK - QL - RT RM - SN - TV

Read the given statements and conclusions carefully. You have to take the given statements to be true even if they seem to be at variance from commonly known facts. You have to decide which conclusions logically follows from the given statements. Statements: All fans are motors. All motors are scooters. Conclusion (I) - All fans are scooters Conclusion (II) - All fans are scooters
In a certain code language, 'queen chin steak' is coded as 'kc eq rq' and 'steak arch forum' is coded as 'yg kc mz'. How is 'steak' coded in the given language?
